# FlowX.AI

> FlowX.AI is an enterprise platform for building and deploying AI agents in regulated industries (banking, insurance, logistics). It wraps legacy core systems with a deterministic, auditable multi-agent orchestration layer — modernizing workflows in weeks without rip-and-replace. 220+ production-ready agents, a visual Agent Builder, open-weight models, and published research.

## Key pages
- [AI agents catalog](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/ai-agents): 140+ production-ready agents for banking, insurance and logistics, filterable by industry, use case and deploy effort.
- [ROI calculator](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/roi-calculator): estimate annual savings and FTE capacity freed by a chosen agent stack, with a transparent labor-cost-avoidance model.
- [Open models](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): open-weight (Apache-2.0) models on Hugging Face, benchmarked against frontier models.
- [Research papers](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research): the FlowX.AI technical-paper series on agent reliability, governance, measurement and memory.
- [Blog](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/blog): field guides and playbooks on modernizing banking operations with AI agents.
- [Agent Builder](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/agent-builder): visual workflow engine that compiles agents to deterministic state machines.
- [Observatory](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/observatory): trace and audit every agent decision in production.
- [About](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/about): company, mission and leadership.

## Research papers
- [VERA: Evidence-Graded ROI for Production Agents](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/vera): Bringing counterfactual measurement, causal validation, and confidence-graded accounting to the business case for enterprise AI agents.
- [ORNA: Agent Self-Adaptation in Production](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/orna-autotune): Closing the loop between observability, validation, and node-level refinement for LLM agents in regulated industries.
- [HALO: Zero Hallucination, by Construction](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/halo): Why trustworthy enterprise AI is a property of the harness around the model, not of the model itself: grounding, multi-signal verification, calibrated abstention, and continuous oversight in the FlowX.AI Platform.
- [GAVEL: Governance That Runs Where the Agent Runs](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/gavel): Why governing autonomous AI agents means enforcing policy and producing audit evidence at runtime, over the agent s own telemetry, rather than asserting compliance on paper.
- [SIFT: A Classifier That Teaches Itself](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/sift): A cost-tiered document classifier whose corpus grows from production traffic and whose autonomous retraining is made safe by a frozen evaluation gate.
- [RAILS: The Graph Is Deterministic, Even When the Nodes Are Not](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/rails): How Agent Builder makes enterprise AI agents reliable by compiling visual workflows into deterministic state machines, in which the stochastic model is one bounded, typed node among many.
- [MNEMĒ: A Knowledge Graph Agents Can Write To, Safely](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/research/mneme): MNEME, the FlowX.AI Ontology Layer: a provenance-tracked structured-memory graph that agents read, validate against, and contribute to, without corrupting the institutional source of truth.

## Open models
- [ScamGuard 1.7B (1.7B)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): Scam & fraud detection — Qwen3-1.7B (LoRA), Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/scam-guard-qwen17b
- [ScamGuard 0.6B (0.6B)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): Scam & fraud detection — Qwen3-0.6B (LoRA), Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/scam-guard-qwen06b
- [CEE-PII (~300M)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): PII / sensitive-entity detection — GLiNER multi-v2.1 (mDeBERTa-v3), Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/cee-pii
- [Caveat (4B)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): Risky-clause detection — Qwen3-4B, Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/caveat
- [Sentinel Gate (4B)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): Escalation gate — Qwen3-4B, Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/sentinel-gate
- [Semantic Mapper (4B)](https://bogdandraghici.github.io/flx_landing_explo/v2/models): Ontology extraction — Qwen3-4B (LoRA), Apache-2.0. https://huggingface.co/flowxai/semantic-mapper
